query: SELECT q.id, SUBSTRING(q.text, 1, 50) as question, SUBSTRING(q.options, 1, 200) as options_preview FROM questions q WHERE q.options LIKE '%Ð%' OR q.options LIKE '%Ñ%' LIMIT 5;
